name: Strawberry Divinity Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Preserved Strawberries (drained as dry as possible)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, water, and cream of tartar in a saucepan. Cook over medium heat until the mixture reaches a firm ball stage (248°F).
2. Remove from heat and add drained preserved strawberries.
3. Return to boil for a few seconds before slowly pouring the mixture into stiffly beaten egg whites.
4. Beat until thick and fluffy, then pour into well-buttered pans.
5. Allow to cool and set completely.
6. Cut into squares once firm.
Any thick preserves or candied fruit may be substituted for strawberries.
